sections.paragraph:
Original: ארתּחשׁשׁתּא ארתּחשׁשׁתּא

Transliteration: 'artachshashtâ' 'artachshasht'

Phonetic: ar-takh-shash-taw'

BDB Definition:

Artaxerxes = "I will make the spoiled to boil: I will stir myself (in) winter"
  1. son and successor of Xerxes as emperor of Persia, 465-424 BC

Origin: of foreign origin

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
